title: Dacrycarpus kawaii
taxonomy: Dacrycarpus kawaii is a species of coniferous tree in the family Podocarpaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Japan. The plant is also known as Kauri of Japan or Kawaii kauri. Dacrycarpus kawaii is a member of the order Pinales and is closely related to other species within the family Podocarpaceae. It is a relatively rare and endemic species found only in a few locations in Japan.
